error.no_configs: No encryption configurations found. Please add configurations in Key Configuration Management first
error.no_successful_decrypt: Failed to successfully decrypt this content with any configuration

usage.title: Usage Instructions
usage.instruction1: The system will use all saved encryption configurations to attempt decryption sequentially
usage.instruction2: Only successful decryption results are displayed
usage.instruction3: Successful results are highlighted with green theme
usage.tip: Tip: Please ensure correct encryption configurations have been added in Key Configuration Management
